Log \#20  
Prompt: Take this application and make the following changes: Improve the visibility of the reel icons, as they are still cut off and barely visible, especially for the 5-reel game mode. Also, the upper components are still overlapping when the machine is not rolling, so please fix that so it doesn’t overlap and is flush with the slot machine web application.

Observations:   
🎯 Iteration 20 — What changed  
🎰 Reel Icon Centering \+ Visibility  
Centered the reel symbols more consistently inside each reel window  
Reworked symbol rendering so icons use an inner glyph layer instead of relying only on raw emoji bounds  
Added symbol-specific visual tuning for uneven icons so they sit more naturally in the middle  
Shrank the Big 5-Reel symbols multiple times and increased inner spacing so wide icons like cherry and olive stop getting clipped  
🔒 Game Mode Lock During Spins  
Blocked game mode changes while the reels are actively spinning  
Disabled the mode buttons during spins so they cannot be switched mid-roll  
Added a second safety guard in the click handler so rapid clicks cannot force a mode change through  
📐 Machine Core / Upper Layout Separation  
Rebalanced the cabinet grid so the center machine has more room and the right rail stays contained  
Changed the upper machine feedback area so it no longer crowds the neighboring panel  
Tightened the right-side scoreboard containment so stat cards stay inside their column  
Reduced the result card width and adjusted spacing so upper machine content stays flush with the slot machine layout  
🧾 Result / Recent Spins Spacing  
Added more space around the machine core and reel/result area  
Adjusted the result overlay so it opens more cleanly beneath the reels  
Improved separation between the machine and the Recent Spins area so generated results do not visually crash into the history section  
📱 Big 5-Reel Readability  
Adjusted 5-reel spacing, padding, and symbol scale so icons remain visible without being cut off  
Kept the taller 5-reel windows while reducing symbol pressure against the reel edges  
Improved readability for tighter symbols without breaking the rest of the reel layout  
⚡ Net Effect  
Reel icons are more centered and much less likely to clip, especially in Big 5-Reel mode  
Game modes cannot be switched while spinning  
The upper machine content no longer overlaps the neighboring score panel  
The result area and Recent Spins section stay visually separated and more stable  
Verification: npm.cmd run check:js and npm.cmd test both pass.

Validation:   
No HTML or CSS errors
